rationale: The only D arrives at the brightest centroid — I'll commit the muhayyar gesture with elevation: a background warming toward pale candlelight and a sustained luminous bloom that widens gently on the impulse, not a punch.

input.svg_markup: <svg viewBox="-500 -500 1000 1000" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><radialGradient id="bloom" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#f5e6c8" stop-opacity="0.85"/><stop offset="0.25" stop-color="#e8d4a0" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="0.55" stop-color="#d4a574" stop-opacity="0.22"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#2a1f14" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient><linearGradient id="hz" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0.5" y2="0.5"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#f5e6c8" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#f5e6c8" stop-opacity="0.95"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#f5e6c8" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="460" fill="url(#bloom)"><animate attributeName="r" values="430;480;430" dur="9s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></circle><rect x="-470" y="-2.5" width="940" height="5" fill="url(#hz)"/><rect x="-380" y="-1" width="760" height="2" fill="#f5e6c8" opacity="0.7"/></svg>

input.style: serif italic, medium, pale candlelight, generous tracking
